meaning: n.[基督教]救世主(特指耶稣基督)
examples: The birth of Christ was the beginning of a major epoch of world history.
In some schools, Christmas carols are being modified to exclude any reference to Christ.
We, however, have the mind of Christ.
Christ came to comfort the poor and the sick and the essence of Christmas is a new birth.
He then oversaw a ceremony at the 2, 000-year-old Colosseum recalling Christ's final journey with the cross.
